access_model.payment_receiver: Tilda cart ST100 + configured T-Bank/Tinkoff or existing project payment provider after visual verification
access_model.delivery_rule: For one pilot, sell access to a protected Members/Courses page after successful payment; then scale to one group per lecture or one recordings library group.
access_model.video_protection_rule: Do not rely on public or unlisted YouTube links as protection. Use a protected Tilda Members/course page and avoid exposing the raw video link where possible.
